violations.description: Temperature measuring devices. — --Temperature measuring device was not provided. No thermometer found when inspecting fride/freezer unit in kitchen area.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food *. Raw 10 lb beef stored above ready to eat sandwiches in walk-in cooler

Preventing contamination by consumers. — --Food on display for self service was not properly protected by food guards, display cases, or similarly effective means. Sneeze guard for Hot Dog Roller not covering hotdogs adequately.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Chilli/Goulash not labeled/dated when stored in walk in cooler
